# Atlas

> Deploy-anywhere text-to-SQL data analyst agent. Open-source under AGPL-3.0.

Atlas connects to your database, auto-generates a YAML semantic layer from your schema, and lets an AI agent query your data in plain English. It validates every query (read-only, AST-parsed, table-whitelisted) and returns structured results with charts and narrative.

## Core capabilities

- **Text-to-SQL agent**: Multi-step reasoning powered by Vercel AI SDK. Explores schema, writes validated SQL, runs Python analysis, returns charts and narrative.
- **Semantic layer**: YAML-based entity definitions with auto-profiling, glossary terms, metrics, joins, and LLM enrichment. Versioned in git, reviewed in PRs.
- **7 databases**: PostgreSQL, MySQL, ClickHouse, Snowflake, DuckDB, BigQuery, Salesforce.
- **6 LLM providers**: Anthropic, OpenAI, AWS Bedrock, Ollama, OpenAI-compatible (vLLM, TGI, LiteLLM), AI Gateway.
- **21+ plugins**: Datasource adapters, sandbox backends (nsjail, E2B, Daytona, Vercel sandbox), interaction channels, action triggers. Extensible via Plugin SDK.
- **9+ integration channels**: Slack, Microsoft Teams, Discord, Email, Google Chat, Telegram, GitHub, Linear, WhatsApp, plus webhooks.
- **Embeddable**: Script tag widget, React component (`@useatlas/react`), TypeScript SDK (`@useatlas/sdk`), headless API.
- **MCP server**: Works with Claude Desktop, Cursor, and any MCP-compatible client.
- **Dynamic learning**: Learns query patterns over time. Stored as auditable YAML, not opaque embeddings.

## Security

Every query passes through a 7-layer validation pipeline:
1. Empty check
2. Regex mutation guard (blocks INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DROP)
3. AST parse via node-sql-parser (single SELECT only)
4. Table whitelist (only semantic layer entities)
5. Row-level security injection (optional)
6. Auto LIMIT (default 1000)
7. Statement timeout (default 30s)

All database connections are read-only. Credentials stay on your infrastructure.

## Deployment

- **Self-hosted** (free, AGPL-3.0): Docker, Railway, or Vercel. `bun create atlas-agent my-app`
- **Atlas Cloud** (managed): Starter ($29/seat/mo), Pro ($59/seat/mo), and Business ($99/seat/mo) plans at https://app.useatlas.dev — all with 14-day free trial

## Tech stack

TypeScript, Hono (API), Next.js (frontend), Effect.ts (backend services), Vercel AI SDK (agent loop), Bun (runtime).

## Links

- Website: https://www.useatlas.dev
- Documentation: https://docs.useatlas.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/AtlasDevHQ/atlas
- Cloud: https://app.useatlas.dev
- npm packages: @useatlas/sdk, @useatlas/react, @useatlas/types, @useatlas/plugin-sdk
